ServiceInquiry.title: Service Inquiry
ServiceInquiry.description: An inquiry submitted from the Services section modal.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the inquiry.

email.description: The email address of the person.

phone.description: The phone number of the person.

service.description: The service they are inquiring about.

message.description: The message or details of the inquiry.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.

ContactMessage.title: Contact Message
ContactMessage.description: A message submitted from the Contact form.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the message.

email.description: The email address of the person.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the message was submitted.

/service_inquiries/{inquiryId}.description: Stores inquiries from the Services modal.

/contact_messages/{messageId}.description: Stores messages from the Contact form.
